raw_text: juan higuera aerospace engineer aerospace engineer with a passion for science and technology. throughout my experience in technology companies have learned how the power of teamwork can drive projects to success. it would be my pleasure to develop my career (+34) 676 196 750 juan.higuerab@gmail.com in cutting edge technology surrounded by a diverse group of people who need to work together to achieve their goals. international exp. working abroad france (oct to nov 19) & singapore (feb to mar 20) indra led on-site acceptance test working on military abroad facilities. dependable. english school bournemouth aug to dec 17 international volunteering china one month summer 16 worked as a teacher of teenagers about world heritage and culture. communication and leadership skills. erasmus + cyprus two weeks jun 16 attended workshops to enhance teamworking and culture understanding among ue students. multicultural environment. achievements company news web - aerospace production systems fuels and lubricants. itskills languages matlab python spanish (native) vba catia v5 english (c1) 11th may, 1993 career indra simulation testing engineering a330 mrtt aircraft and helicopters simulation. validation and certification department. feb 19 to nowadays, madrid. ability to deal with demanding environments where new and integrated knowledge is constantly required: acquired overview of aircraft systems and simulators. worked with pilot clients to demonstrate and ensure simulator capacities meet requirements. understood the importance of quality and on time work. + supported engineer developers by analysing functional and technical simulator behaviour and reporting bugs and improvements. airbus manufacturing engineering a350 internship. getafe, different departments, blue and white collar. teamwork. uav navigation flight control department internship. madrid february to april 17 + cutting-edge company in development of autopilots for unmanned aerial vehicles (uav). worked together with flight control department testing control software for high speed and low altitude aircraft. educational background decision making and innovation master feb 19 universidad de alcala de henares fue improved soft skills such as effective communication, leading people and teams, product management, corporate strategy, finance, innovation and change. aerospace engineering (75/100) bachelor's degree june 2017 universidad politécnica de madrid acquired great analytical capacity to find solutions to complex problems. dissertation: conceptual design of an internal combustion engine. set optimal parameters for both the thermodynamic cycle and the dynamics of the mechanism. studied engine vibrations to the vehicle structure.
